title: aidia merrillii
intro: Aidia merrillii, also known as the "Wild Lime" or "Fingered Citron", is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aidia merrillii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Aidia merrillii is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or extract, with some cultures also using the plant's leaves and fruits in traditional remedies.
